thought: Blend the external combat reference as timing and micro-motion language only, while strictly preserving the first frame as a vertical store_ui idle equipment interface. The first frame @0001.png locks composition, anchors, and scene state: top-right resource UI stays fixed, the middle side-view hero-versus-enemy preview remains in place, and the bottom equipment panel remains the main interactive area. To follow the logic lock, the sequence begins with a user tap on the highlighted purple wing item, then plays selection glow, equip confirmation, and upgrade success inside the lower panel without turning the whole scene into free combat. The combat video @trimmed_best_ref_1774789507.mp4 is merged as a localized battle-preview rhythm in the center lane only: short repeated hit flashes, dense readable damage numbers, slight enemy recoil, and static camera cadence. This keeps continuity from the exact captured frame, respects the store UI image type, and uses slow, clear UI interaction plus compact combat feedback so anatomy, face stability, and interface readability remain intact.
prompt_en: First Frame: @0001.png. Reference Video: @trimmed_best_ref_1774789507.mp4. Motion Style Reference: use the reference only for compact side-view attack cadence, dense stacked hit feedback, readable impact flashes, minimal camera movement, and sustained arcade-like pressure, while strictly preserving the original vertical store UI composition and idle preparation logic from the first frame. Start with @0001.png as the first frame to lock character consistency, layout consistency, UI anchor positions, and the straight-on side-view gameplay screen. Cute medieval fantasy, stylized mobile ARPG, vertical screen side-scrolling battle layout, cartoon monster design, clean combat readability, 4K ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, no jitter, stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement. [00s-02s] (Background Layer) Keep the muted dungeon-like stage preview and all top UI bars fixed exactly as in @0001.png, no camera pan, no scene replacement. (Character/Action Layer) The small white-haired hero in the middle preview performs a subtle idle breathing and cloak sway using @hero_ui_idle_reaction_sheet_210834.png, while the golden enemy holds a light idle stance from @enemy_idle_sheet_210921.png. (VFX Layer) A soft tap ripple appears only over the highlighted purple wing tile in the bottom panel using @ui_click_ripple_sheet_210558.png. (UI Layer) The selected equipment card gains a brighter purple outline and pulsing edge glow from @purple_wing_select_glow_sheet_210654.png, with the rest of the grid staying in place and readable. [02s-04s] (Background Layer) The overall layout remains locked, preserving top-to-bottom visual flow and center focus. (Character/Action Layer) The hero in the battle preview gives a tiny anticipatory lean and confident Live2D reaction synced to the item selection, still not leaving the preview lane. (VFX Layer) A concentrated purple aura briefly wraps the selected wing icon and sends a thin vertical light sweep upward. (UI Layer) A compact equip confirmation window pops up inside the lower panel from @equip_confirm_popup_210745.png, with button highlight and stat emphasis animation, as if the user confirms equip or upgrade; no full-screen takeover. [04s-07s] (Background Layer) Preserve the stage preview exactly; no environment shift. (Character/Action Layer) After confirmation, inject the reference video rhythm into the middle combat preview only: the hero executes a short auto-attack burst with compact forward strikes and fast recovery, while staying in the same center lane and scale. The enemy receives repeated light hit-stun and slight recoil, never flying off-screen. (VFX Layer) Use localized hit flashes and short slash bursts inspired by @trimmed_best_ref_1774789507.mp4. (UI Layer) Add dense but readable orange-red floating damage numbers and tiny HP reduction in the preview area using @damage_loot_ui_pack_182021.png, keeping the top-right and bottom UI fully visible. [07s-09s] (Background Layer) Still static side-view camera, no zoom, no scene cut. (Character/Action Layer) The hero settles back into idle with a satisfied pose; the enemy returns to a restrained idle-react loop. (VFX Layer) A clean upgrade completion shimmer appears over the selected item slot. (UI Layer) Show successful equip or upgrade feedback using @item_upgrade_success_ui_211012.png: brief gold-purple flash, updated item level/status, and a small stat-up pulse in the lower panel. [09s-12s] (Background Layer) Keep the original shop/equipment interface composition untouched. (Character/Action Layer) The battle preview remains ready-state idle, implying preparation for the next stage rather than entering full combat. (VFX Layer) Faint residual sparkles fade around the wing item and the hero preview. (UI Layer) The selected item stays equipped with enhanced border glow, all navigation buttons remain fixed, the stage requirement text remains readable, and the final frame holds a polished upgraded-preparation state. Warm side light mixed with soft UI emissive glow, crisp outlines, thick cartoon rendering, mobile game commercial quality, stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement, sharp focus, readable interface, no jitter.
prompt_zh: > 首帧锁定: @0001.png。参考视频: @trimmed_best_ref_1774789507.mp4。动作风格参考: 仅提取参考视频里的横版 ARPG 紧凑攻击节奏、密集飘字命中反馈、短促受击闪光、几乎静止的镜头与持续压制感，但必须严格保持首帧原本的竖屏商店/装备 UI 构图和待机准备状态，不把界面直接改成完整战斗场景。以 @0001.png 作为首帧锁定角色样貌、服装、界面布局、锚点位置与直视侧面玩法视角。Q 萌中世纪奇幻，手游风格放置 ARPG，竖屏横版战斗预览构图，卡通怪物设计，战斗与 UI 可读性清晰，4K ultra HD，cinematic texture，rich details，no jitter，stable face without deformation，clear facial features，normal anatomical structure，natural proportions，non-stiff movement。[00s-02s] (Background Layer) 保持 @0001.png 中的地牢感中景预览、顶部资源栏、右侧快捷按钮、底部装备面板全部固定不变，不切场，不推镜。 (Character/Action Layer) 中部战斗预览中的白发小英雄使用 @hero_ui_idle_reaction_sheet_210834.png 做轻微呼吸和披风摆动，右侧金色敌人使用 @enemy_idle_sheet_210921.png 保持轻微待机对峙。 (VFX Layer) 仅在底部高亮紫色翅膀装备格上叠加 @ui_click_ripple_sheet_210558.png 的点击波纹。 (UI Layer) 该装备卡牌边框被 @purple_wing_select_glow_sheet_210654.png 点亮，出现稳定的紫色脉冲描边，其余格子位置和信息不变，确保界面清晰。 [02s-04s] (Background Layer) 整体竖向布局和 top-to-bottom 视觉流保持完全一致。 (Character/Action Layer) 中部英雄因装备被选中而出现轻微自信反应，身体只做很小幅度前倾，不离开原本预览站位。 (VFX Layer) 被选中的紫翼图标周围升起一圈浓缩紫光，并有一条细窄竖向扫光向上掠过。 (UI Layer) 在底部面板内部弹出 @equip_confirm_popup_210745.png 的小型装备/强化确认窗，按钮轻微发亮，属性对比区域短暂强调，像用户完成穿戴或升级确认，但不遮挡整个画面。 [04s-07s] (Background Layer) 场景不变化，镜头继续稳定。 (Character/Action Layer) 确认后，仅把参考视频 @trimmed_best_ref_1774789507.mp4 的战斗节奏注入中部小型战斗预览：英雄做一小段自动攻击连打，动作紧凑、前向出手、快速收招，始终停留在原本中心预览通道；敌人受到连续命中后出现轻微后仰和短暂硬直，不夸张击飞。 (VFX Layer) 参考视频的命中感觉，在预览区局部叠加短促斩击闪光与接触火花。 (UI Layer) 使用 @damage_loot_ui_pack_182021.png 在中部预览区域生成密集但可读的橙红色伤害数字、轻微血量下降反馈，顶部和底部 UI 仍然完整可见。 [07s-09s] (Background Layer) 继续保持静止侧视镜头，不缩放，不切镜。 (Character/Action Layer) 英雄完成短 burst 后回到从容待机，敌人恢复克制的受击后待机状态。 (VFX Layer) 被选中装备格上方出现干净利落的强化完成闪耀。 (UI Layer) 调用 @item_upgrade_success_ui_211012.png 显示强化/穿戴成功反馈：金紫色短闪、已更新的等级或状态、小幅属性上升脉冲，都局限在底部面板内。 [09s-12s] (Background Layer) 原始商店/装备界面构图完全保留。 (Character/Action Layer) 中部战斗预览恢复准备状态待机，表达“备战下一关”而不是立即进入正式战斗。 (VFX Layer) 紫翼装备和英雄预览周围只残留少量缓慢消散的微光粒子。 (UI Layer) 选中的装备维持已装备/已升级状态和增强边框，右侧导航、顶部资源、关卡条件文字保持清晰可读，最终停留在一个完成强化、准备推进关卡的 polished 终帧。光影采用暖侧光混合柔和 UI 自发光，卡通厚描边，手游宣传级质感，stable face without deformation，clear facial features，normal anatomical structure，natural proportions，non-stiff movement，sharp focus，readable interface，no jitter。
